plugins.name: setup-repo
plugins.description: Repo setup automations. Includes auto-merge-pr (automated PR review + merge-on-approval via a Claude GitHub-integration routine and a fix/verdict bridge), e2e-coverage-routine (a scheduled routine that grows E2E coverage via PRs, with an E2E-on-local-stack CI workflow and a PR bridge), and dependency-update-routine (a scheduled routine that opens one PR/run of gate-green patch/minor dependency updates, escalating majors/sensitive packages).
